name: Withered Reeds Eclipse the Sun
title: Consecrated Fanged Beast: Withered Reeds Eclipse the Sun
desc: "Human beings' baits and the remains of immortal beings are essentially deliberate or unintentional traps. The price of coveting the gift of the strongest is much more painful than being locked in a cage."
in_play_description: After you play or Discard Bonecruncher's Energy Block: Draw 1 card. (Once per Round)

attributes.source: Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge against the Consecrated Fanged Beast at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives in a Friendly Fracas

skills.desc:
Fast Action: Equip this to your Consecrated Fanged Beast.
After you play or Discard Bonecruncher's Energy Block: Draw 1 card. (Once per Round)
(You must have Consecrated Fanged Beast in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
